chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 32 of 2005 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.03.2026. None present. ********** None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. This matter has been pending for over 20 years without any significant progress, nor any of the parties have appeared to pursue the matter with any due diligence. Accordingly, the instant JCM is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AYAZ
